title: New Website Supports Center’s Mission
summary: The Belfer Center is pleased to call your attention to its newly designed and re-engineered website, belfercenter.org.
body: The Belfer Center is pleased to call your attention to its newly designed and re-engineered website, https://www.belfercenter.org . This new website is the culmination of an extensive redesign process working alongside Boston-based firms Pod Consulting and Moth Design. Together, we created a web platform that unifies the Center’s work, furthers its reach, and shines a brighter light on the people and ideas that advance our mission. Navigation The new site’s intuitive information architecture ensures all content is easily discoverable. Tens of thousands of pages of original site content was migrated from former web environments and re-organized to facilitate user-friendly site navigation and browsing. The main menu in the header area improves ease of use by incorporating all accessible content in a streamlined method. On the desktop version of the site, the main menu is expandable through a mega-dropdown style, as indicated by downward facing arrows. Rolling over a navigation item with the downward arrow opens the mega menu, exposing an additional menu on the left hand side that is also activated on rollover. Search For visitors looking for something specific, the advanced search feature allows you to find content by keywords or full page titles. To run a more detailed query, users may also select a category from the accompanying dropdown option to filter results within a specific area of the website – Research, Experts, Programs & Projects, Fellowships, or Events. Content-rich search results can then be further refined through the use of faceted filters by region, topic, date range, author, and more. Visual Design These usability enhancements in conjunction with a refreshed visual design allow the new site to better serve as a hub of distribution for the Belfer Center’s work. The front-end design has been updated with modern features and a refreshed aesthetic that supports the relevance of our research to contemporary policy challenges. Homepage The new homepage curates some of the most insightful, forward-looking, and solution-centered ideas on global issues you will read anywhere. Showcased on the front page are a main feature, three spotlight stories, and additional topic-based research and related experts. Also included is a list of noteworthy upcoming events, featured experts, and the most viewed publications on the website that day. Research All publication pages now support both short and long-form storytelling with the implementation of various in-page modules and embedded multimedia that serve to supplement the research and create a more engaging experience. If you desire more information after reading a publication, there are additional recommendations and related tags that allow readers to explore related work on the website. New Features In addition to enhancing the Center’s existing research products, the new site has a number of prominent additions to its research-based digital offerings, such as: • ‘Special Initiatives’ under Programs & Projects contains blogs and other distinctive websites from the Center that are now all accessible under the main Belfer website. • A multimedia section with photo galleries, original videos, broadcast appearances, and podcasts. User Experience We took a user-centered approach to planning for the new site. An astounding 80% of all internet users own a smartphone, with 83% reporting that a seamless experience across all devices is important, so it was imperative that the diverse technology needs of our visitors were met. The site was built with a responsive design; making it adaptable across all widely used browsers and devices – be it desktop, tablet, or mobile. Engagement Engagement of users with site content is strongly encouraged on the new website. There are social media sharing features that allow readers to seamlessly connect with their social networks and easily share Belfer Center content with their friends and colleagues. The new comment feature found at the bottom of many publication pages also encourages visitors to share their opinions and join the discussion. Experts One of the Belfer Center’s top commodities is its community of leading authorities in government and academia from all over the world. The expanded Experts area includes an ‘In the Spotlight’ section that shows trending subjects in the news, and the top Center experts available for commentary in that area. Members of the press can also now directly request commentary from experts using the new ‘request interview’ button, which sends a direct inquiry to the appropriate point of contact. Visitors can find the entire pool of experts in the ‘All Experts’ tab, or search for specific experts using the advanced filters for name, internal affiliations, and areas of expertise. We hope you will use and enjoy the new website. Please explore it and send feedback to Arielle_Dworkin@hks.harvard.edu The latest from Belfer See more Recommended citation Dworkin, Arielle. "New Website Supports Center’s Mission with Advanced Features." Belfer Center Newsletter, Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs, Harvard Kennedy School (Summer 2017). _list.source: Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs, Harvard Kennedy School

result.main_content_en: The Belfer Center has launched a newly redesigned website to better serve as a hub for its work. The redesign, developed with consulting and design firms, focuses on improved navigation through an intuitive menu system and advanced search capabilities with filters. The site features a modern, responsive design for optimal viewing across all devices and integrates rich multimedia content within its research publications. New functionalities include enhanced expert directories with direct interview request options for media, curated homepage content, and social sharing features to encourage user engagement and discussion. The platform consolidates special initiatives, blogs, and multimedia resources under a unified domain, aiming to broaden the Center's reach and impact.
result.main_content_zh: 贝尔弗科学与国际事务中心推出了全新设计的官方网站，旨在更好地作为其研究成果的发布枢纽。此次改版与外部咨询和设计公司合作完成，重点改进了网站导航，采用了直观的菜单系统和带有筛选功能的高级搜索。网站采用现代化的响应式设计，确保在所有设备上都能获得最佳浏览体验，并在研究出版物中整合了丰富的多媒体内容。新功能包括增强的专家目录（媒体可直接请求采访）、精心策划的主页内容以及鼓励用户参与和讨论的社交分享功能。该平台将特别倡议、博客和多媒体资源统一整合，以扩大中心的影响力和覆盖范围。
